visa_types.name: Temporary Work Visa (TWV)
visa_types.documents_required:
Please click here for Documents required
Notes:
- For documents, an applicant needs to submit one set of hard copies. Kindly carry your original supporting documents required only for verification.
visa_types.visa_fees:
With effect from 05 May 2021, the visa fees are as follow: Visa Fee may vary depending on the current exchange rate.

[Table:     Temporary Work Visa (TWV) ]
Note:
Visa fee for all visa categories is to be paid at PNB BGC ONE McKinley Branch. All fees are payable in cash. Below are the banking details to be used when paying the visa fee:
- Name of Account: Embassy of Nigeria Manila Philippines Revenue Account
- Bank: Philippine National Bank (PNB)
- Account Number: 1445-1000-7370
An official receipt should be obtained for all payments made. Applicants may opt for a courier-assisted facility whereby your passport and other documents will be returned via courier. This facility is available at an extra cost.
Please note that the visa fees are indicated above. No other amount will be requested for the visa issuance or for urgent processing
Terms and Conditions:
Kindly be informed that Visa Fee, Logistic fee and other additional service fees are non-refundable if application is rejected or withdrawn.
visa_types.processing_time:
The processing time for the application  at the Embassy of Nigeria is mininum5-10 working days.
 Submission of application:
Monday and  Thursday : 08:00 -11:00 AM
Releasing for  Transit Visa: Wednesday and Friday 15:00 – 17:00 PM same week from submission          
Releasing of  all other Visa: Friday the following week after submission 15:00 – 17:00 PM
visa_types.overview:
Overview
TWP visa are for those applicants who wish to travel to Nigeria for work for a temporary period.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
TWP visa are for those applicants who wish to travel to Nigeria for work for a temporary period.

## Visa Fees
With effect from 05 May 2021, the visa fees are as follow: Visa Fee may vary depending on the current exchange rate.

[Table:     Temporary Work Visa (TWV) ]
Note:
Visa fee for all visa categories is to be paid at PNB BGC ONE McKinley Branch. All fees are payable in cash. Below are the banking details to be used when paying the visa fee:
- Name of Account: Embassy of Nigeria Manila Philippines Revenue Account
- Bank: Philippine National Bank (PNB)
- Account Number: 1445-1000-7370
An official receipt should be obtained for all payments made. Applicants may opt for a courier-assisted facility whereby your passport and other documents will be returned via courier. This facility is available at an extra cost.
Please note that the visa fees are indicated above. No other amount will be requested for the visa issuance or for urgent processing
Terms and Conditions:
Kindly be informed that Visa Fee, Logistic fee and other additional service fees are non-refundable if application is rejected or withdrawn.

## Documents Required

Please click here for Documents required
Notes:
- For documents, an applicant needs to submit one set of hard copies. Kindly carry your original supporting documents required only for verification.

## Photo Specifications

[Table:     Tourist Visa ]

[Table:     Tourist Visa ]

[Table:     Tourist Visa ]

[Table:     Tourist Visa ]

## Processing Time
The processing time for the application  at the Embassy of Nigeria is mininum5-10 working days.
 Submission of application:
Monday and  Thursday : 08:00 -11:00 AM
Releasing for  Transit Visa: Wednesday and Friday 15:00 – 17:00 PM same week from submission          
Releasing of  all other Visa: Friday the following week after submission 15:00 – 17:00 PM
